title: Yeast-Malt-Sucrose-Agar
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5mdkh","text":"Preparation  of yeast-malt-sucrose-agar, that is used as solid media for growing Zt. This is called 'YMA' in Bruce McDonald lab, althoug the same acronym is used also for different media.\n\nHave a look for example: Zain, M. E., et al. 'Influence of growth medium on diagnostic characters of Aspergillus and Penicillium species.' African Journal of Microbiology Research 3.5 (2009): 280-286.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":81,"length":3},{"style":"italic","offset":328,"length":40}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
